text.autoconfig.locator-heads.option.com: Custom colour for the compass direction letters (supports hex)
text.autoconfig.locator-heads.option.ena: Show coloured borders around player heads based on their team or a static colour
text.autoconfig.locator-heads.option.bor: Use team colour or a static chosen colour for borders (and name tint)
text.autoconfig.locator-heads.option.sta: Custom colour for static border (supports hex)
